query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Pres. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pres,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Visc. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visc,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Bar. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bar,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Cde. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cde,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Mq. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mq,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Gov. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as gov,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Trav. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trav,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Tv. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tv,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Estr. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as estr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Rod. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rod,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Vd. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vd,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Com. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Cons. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Des. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as des,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Dep. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as dep
FROM establishments;

  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Tv. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tv,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Estr. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as estr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Rod. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rod,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Vd. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vd,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Com. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Cons. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Des. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as des,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Dep. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as dep
